title: KidZania Mumbai
tagline: KidZania Mumbai — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: KidZania Mumbai is a global indoor theme park, located in R-City Mall, Ghatkopar, Mumbai, India.
overview.description: KidZania Mumbai is a global indoor theme park, located in R-City Mall, Ghatkopar, Mumbai, India. It is a family entertainment centre for children in the age group of 4 to 16 to enhance their social and cognitive skills. Opened in August 2013, KidZania Mumbai is India's first, and the world's 14th KidZania theme park.

topPlaces.name: Amrut Nagar
topPlaces.description: Amrut Nagar is a neighbourhood in Ghatkopar, a suburb of Mumbai in India. Amrut Nagar borders Ghatkopar (West), and is adjacent to Parksite, Vikhroli.

topPlaces.name: July 2003 Mumbai bombing
topPlaces.description: At 21:15 on 28 July 2003 a bomb placed under a seat of a BEST bus exploded on the busy Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg in Ghatkopar. The bomb was placed in the rear of the bus, killing four people and injuring 32.

topPlaces.name: R City Mall
topPlaces.description: R City Mall is a shopping mall located in Ghatkopar West, Mumbai. The mall spreads across 1.2 million square feet with the capacity to house over 350 stores.

topPlaces.name: 2018 UY Aviation King Air C90 crash
topPlaces.description: On 28 June 2018, at about 1:15 pm, a Beechcraft C90 King Air aircraft chartered from UY Aviation Pvt Ltd with the registration VT-UPZ crashed at Jagruti Nagar in the suburb of Ghatkopar in Mumbai, India. The 12-seater aircraft carried 4 people, including the pilot.

image.alt: 2018 UY Aviation King Air C90 crash

topPlaces.name: Jagruti Nagar metro station
topPlaces.description: Jagruti Nagar is an elevated metro station on the East-West Corridor of the Blue Line 1 of Mumbai Metro in Mumbai, India. It was opened to the public on 8 June 2014.

topPlaces.name: Asalpha metro station
topPlaces.description: Asalpha is an elevated metro station on the East-West Corridor of the Blue Line 1 of Mumbai Metro in Mumbai, India. It was opened to the public on 8 June 2014.

topPlaces.name: Ghatkopar metro station
topPlaces.description: Ghatkopar is the elevated eastern terminal metro station on the East-West Corridor of the Blue Line 1 of Mumbai Metro serving the Ghatkopar suburb of Mumbai, India. It was opened to the public on 8 June 2014.

topPlaces.name: Jagruti Nagar
topPlaces.description: Jagurti Nagar is a locality in the suburb of Ghatkopar in Mumbai, India. It lies along the arterial Andheri-Ghatkopar Link Road and is served by the Jagruti Nagar metro station of Mumbai Metro's Line 1.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit KidZania Mumbai?
faq.a: The best time to visit KidZania Mumbai is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach KidZania Mumbai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (5 km) and the nearest railway station is Mumbai CSMT (20 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for KidZania Mumbai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of KidZania Mumbai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in KidZania Mumbai?
faq.a: Stays in KidZania Mumbai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in KidZania Mumbai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Amrut Nagar, July 2003 Mumbai bombing, R City Mall, 2018 UY Aviation King Air C90 crash, Jagruti Nagar metro station.
